title: Oberüberhausen
description: Optimized modpack for the OberAttack server with QoL and performance mods for smoother and comfortable gameplay.
body:
The OberAttack Modpack is designed to provide the ultimate multiplayer experience for members of the Oberüberhausen community. Every mod in this pack is either required to play on the OberAttack server or explicitly allowed, ensuring full compatibility and compliance with server rules.

Built with performance, stability, and ease of use in mind, this pack guarantees smooth gameplay without unnecessary extras. Unlike other modpacks that may include a variety of additional features, this one keeps things clean and efficient—focusing solely on what’s essential for the best possible experience on our server.

Regular updates ensure that you always have the latest approved mods, keeping up with server changes and new Minecraft versions as quickly as possible. If you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out to the community—we’re always happy to help!
